name: claude-memory
description: Three-tier cross-session memory for Claude Code. Every session is captured reliably (git metadata + transcript snapshot) via a SessionStart catch-up sweep plus a best-effort SessionEnd fast-path; a weekly consolidation folds captures into redacted narrative rollups and distills durable decision-heuristics; everything relevant is auto-injected at session start. Per-project, opt-in, local-only.
